data.title: Bitcoin Season Or Altcoin Season? Shiba Inu Exec Outlines What’s Happening
data.description:
The debate over whether the crypto market is in Bitcoin Season or on the verge of Altcoin Season has dragged on for many months, especially due to Ethereum’s price action in the past few days. LUCIE, Shiba Inu’s marketing lead, recently touched on the matter, sharing insights on what’s currently happening, what to expect for an altcoin season, and when to anticipate a breakout in the Altcoin Season Index. Altcoin Season Index Points To Bitcoin Dominance Many traders and analysts have been closely watching the Altcoin Season Index, with posts on the social media platform X and news reports increasing in anticipation of a market-wide move that could favor altcoins against Bitcoin. Although the current market still tilts toward Bitcoin, signs of change are starting to emerge, especially with Ethereum now approaching the $4,000 price level
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-season-altcoin-season/

data.title: Trump Claims Tariffs Have a HUGE Positive Impact on the Stock Market: Is This True or False?
data.description:
Former President Donald Trump asserts that the implementation of tariffs has a significantly beneficial effect on the stock market's performance. However, this raises the question: Is his claim backed by evidence, or is it merely a matter of opinion? Let's examine the validity of his statement by analyzing economic data and expert opinions to determine whether Trump's assertion is true or false.
source: https://blocknews.com/trump-claims-tariffs-have-a-huge-positive-impact-on-the-stock-market-is-this-true-or-false/

data.title: SEC Green Light on Liquid Staking Sends ETH Past $4K, Spurs Broad Staking and Layer-2 Rally
data.description:
The recent approval by the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) concerning liquid staking has significantly impacted the cryptocurrency market, causing the price of Ethereum (ETH) to surge beyond the $4,000 mark. This positive development not only boosted ETH's value but also triggered a widespread rally across various staking protocols and Layer-2 solutions, further invigorating investor interest and activity in these sectors. As a result, the overall sentiment in the crypto space has become increasingly optimistic, with market participants eager to explore the potential benefits of staking and the enhanced scalability offered by Layer-2 solutions.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/08/08/sec-greenlight-on-liquid-staking-sends-eth-past-usd4k-spurs-broad-staking-and-layer-2-rally

data.title: XRP gains legal clarity in US after Ripple settles SEC case
data.description:
Settlement confirms XRP is not a security in the US. Analysts see potential for a BlackRock XRP ETF. Bitcoin maximalists renew criticism of XRP. Ripple’s multi-year legal battle with the US Securities and Exchange Commission reached a decisive conclusion this week, triggering a sharp rally in XRP’s price and trading volume
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/xrp-gains-legal-clarity-in-us-after-ripple-settles-sec-case/

data.title: XRP Army Celebrates Being on 'Right Side of History’ as SEC’s Ripple Lawsuit Ends
data.description:
The SEC suing Ripple in 2020 prompted the XRP Army to mobilize, and now it's stronger than ever and celebrating its victory.
source: https://decrypt.co/334295/xrp-army-celebrates-right-side-of-history-sec-ripple-lawsuit-ends
